paper_title: ELECTRA: Pre-training Text Encoders as Discriminators Rather Than Generators

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces replaced token detection, a discriminative pre-training task where a model learns to distinguish real input tokens from plausible synthetic replacements generated by a small generator network, improving efficiency and performance over masked language modeling
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, text classification, question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Computational inefficiency and suboptimal performance of masked language modeling (MLM) in language representation learning
